scope.purpose: machine-checkable optimization experience ledger for Rounds 287-299

experienceItems.lesson: A public release proof must name lghui.top, not just a local file or source-origin URL.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail release wording when the public origin is absent from the proof row.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Collapse source, shell, monitor, and browser evidence into one visible current-version proof.

experienceItems.lesson: Local static checks and generated ledgers are route material until the public shell proves the same version.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Reject any completion summary that promotes local-only checks to public completion.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep public shell proof fresh whenever release copy mentions lghui.top.

experienceItems.lesson: site-updates.json top version is a necessary anchor, but it is not a browser proof by itself.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Require feed version plus public entry browser or monitor evidence.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Make stale round leakage fail before a release note is published.

experienceItems.lesson: EDGE_HOME_VERSION and EDGE_RUNTIME_JS_VERSION must travel with the release feed.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail if edge constants and site-updates top version drift apart.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Collapse source, shell, monitor, and browser evidence into one visible current-version proof.

experienceItems.lesson: The public entry chain includes the http to https path, because CDN drift can hide behind HTTPS-only checks.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Keep public browser checks covering the public entry path instead of one direct HTTPS URL.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep public shell proof fresh whenever release copy mentions lghui.top.

experienceItems.lesson: monitor-fluid-public-release.mjs is release evidence because it checks many public routes together.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Do not replace the public monitor with one hand-picked route.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Make stale round leakage fail before a release note is published.

experienceItems.lesson: The public shell and pages.dev source answer different proof questions.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Store public-shell and source-origin rows separately until the release surface converges.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Collapse source, shell, monitor, and browser evidence into one visible current-version proof.

experienceItems.lesson: A stale round marker on any visible public entry blocks current-release language.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Scan for old round signatures before accepting a fresh version claim.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep public shell proof fresh whenever release copy mentions lghui.top.

experienceItems.lesson: Public proof may expose safe audit JSON, but protected source data must remain protected.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Keep protected-source checks separate from safe public audit output.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Make stale round leakage fail before a release note is published.

experienceItems.lesson: A release is current only when the visible public surface shows the current version, not only a hidden JSON value.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Require a visible marker or public monitor result for current-version claims.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Collapse source, shell, monitor, and browser evidence into one visible current-version proof.

experienceItems.lesson: The 316 atomic real-exam questions are the source-aligned SoT after the 308 to 316 correction.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail any ledger that falls back to 308 or hides the 316 anchor.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep 316 atomic questions and 61 grouped sections as the no-merge source truth.

experienceItems.lesson: The 61 grouped source sections are a separate truth from atomic question count.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail when grouped sections are merged away or counted only as atomic rows.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Expose count truth in learner-facing or gate-visible surfaces.

experienceItems.lesson: Source-section granularity prevents grouped subquestions from being flattened into one vague item.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Keep source-section signatures checked in every real-exam count gate.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep answer evidence provenance separate from source-count truth.

experienceItems.lesson: Real-exam counts that affect study trust must be visible, not only stored in JSON.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Reject count fixes that do not surface a visible ledger or gate report.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep 316 atomic questions and 61 grouped sections as the no-merge source truth.

experienceItems.lesson: Four-item and five-item grouped locks protect historical source structure.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail if risky grouped sections lose their lock rows or signatures.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Expose count truth in learner-facing or gate-visible surfaces.

experienceItems.lesson: Web atomic question count must match the source atomic count before learner copy can cite it.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Compare web atomic rows with source atomic rows and block mismatches.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep answer evidence provenance separate from source-count truth.

experienceItems.lesson: Stale count signatures are regressions even when the new JSON looks correct.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Require staleCountSignatureCount to stay zero in count audits.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep 316 atomic questions and 61 grouped sections as the no-merge source truth.

experienceItems.lesson: Review navigation and 181103 tasks must stay tied to the 316/61 surface.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail review queues that drift from current real-exam source counts.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Expose count truth in learner-facing or gate-visible surfaces.

experienceItems.lesson: Having 316 answer rows does not prove original answer-PDF provenance.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Keep answer-count boundary separate from original answer-PDF evidence.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep answer evidence provenance separate from source-count truth.

experienceItems.lesson: A real-exam count audit is not public deployment, auth, or browser proof.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Require release-gate evidence before using count gates as release closure.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep 316 atomic questions and 61 grouped sections as the no-merge source truth.

experienceItems.lesson: The 181103 protected-material inventory has 38 accounted source files.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail if indexed, accounted, and source material counts diverge from 38.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Preserve 38 guarded materials, 30 study routes, and 61 review tasks without raw path leakage.

experienceItems.lesson: The 30 study routes are the safe learner-facing bridge from protected material to site learning.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail if protected inventory exists without route-level study intent.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Route protected material through study intent rather than raw downloads.

experienceItems.lesson: The 61 review tasks connect 181103 material back to the real-exam grouped surface.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail if review tasks drift from the 61 grouped sections.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep redacted inventories byte-consistent with source accounting.

experienceItems.lesson: 181103 output must not expose local paths, file URLs, or raw private route details.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Scan generated docs and JSON for local path and file URL leakage.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Preserve 38 guarded materials, 30 study routes, and 61 review tasks without raw path leakage.

experienceItems.lesson: Guarded inventories should use safe refs, public families, counts, hashes, and byte totals.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Reject raw filenames when a safe source reference is enough.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Route protected material through study intent rather than raw downloads.

experienceItems.lesson: A protected file inventory is not permission to publish raw download routes.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail docs or JSON that advertise raw download endpoints.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep redacted inventories byte-consistent with source accounting.

experienceItems.lesson: Extension and family counts are safe metadata when detached from raw protected paths.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Keep extension summaries while suppressing direct local identifiers.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Preserve 38 guarded materials, 30 study routes, and 61 review tasks without raw path leakage.

experienceItems.lesson: Byte totals help prove accounting without exposing protected paths.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail when source and indexed byte totals mismatch.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Route protected material through study intent rather than raw downloads.

experienceItems.lesson: 181103 material should return users to knowledge lookup, formulas, review, and textbook support.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Reject isolated file lists that do not connect to site-native workflows.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep redacted inventories byte-consistent with source accounting.

experienceItems.lesson: Privacy boundary language must be visible in the report, not buried in code comments.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Require docs to state summary-only output and non-public source boundaries.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Preserve 38 guarded materials, 30 study routes, and 61 review tasks without raw path leakage.

experienceItems.lesson: Private-video UI/mock readiness improves safety but does not prove production recovery.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail production-ready claims when only mock gates have run.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep UI/mock readiness separate from real-account browser proof and storage-backed recovery.

experienceItems.lesson: Real teacher browser proof is required before private-video management is called recovered.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Keep missing credentials as blocked/not-run instead of inferred success.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Require FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 before private-video production recovery language.

experienceItems.lesson: FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 is the storage-backed recovery boundary.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail upload, publish, archive, delete, or access-change recovery claims without R2 proof.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Make destructive private-video actions typed, dry-run-first, and auditable.

experienceItems.lesson: FM_AUDIT KV alone is useful audit plumbing but is not private media storage.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Reject wording that treats KV readiness as media recovery.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep UI/mock readiness separate from real-account browser proof and storage-backed recovery.

experienceItems.lesson: Permanent delete needs typed course-id confirmation and detailed course status.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail destructive UI if delete can proceed without typed identity confirmation.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Require FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 before private-video production recovery language.

experienceItems.lesson: Delete dry-run preflight is a safety gate, not decorative copy.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Require dry-run route coverage before delete action readiness is accepted.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Make destructive private-video actions typed, dry-run-first, and auditable.

experienceItems.lesson: Course-level busy guards prevent overlapping publish, archive, access, and delete actions.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail row actions that can race on the same course id.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep UI/mock readiness separate from real-account browser proof and storage-backed recovery.

experienceItems.lesson: Student denial smoke proves access boundaries better than admin-only happy paths.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Keep student access denial checks in private-video regression gates.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Require FM_PRIVATE_MEDIA R2 before private-video production recovery language.

experienceItems.lesson: Auth readiness may check labels and presence, but must not print credential values.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Scan outputs for sensitive markers and credential-value leakage.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Make destructive private-video actions typed, dry-run-first, and auditable.

experienceItems.lesson: Private-video blocked states must be visible to teachers and release reports.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Reject hidden JSON-only blocked state for storage or real-account blockers.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep UI/mock readiness separate from real-account browser proof and storage-backed recovery.

experienceItems.lesson: When local browser discovery fails, bundled Chromium is the preferred fallback for site QA.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Document the fallback command instead of dropping browser evidence silently.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Prefer bundled Chromium and explicit browser evidence when normal auth browser setup is missing.

experienceItems.lesson: Browser tooling may need the bundled runtime module path before weakening QA claims.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Keep runtime fallback instructions with the browser gate command.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Record browser-not-run boundaries instead of translating process failures into success.

experienceItems.lesson: A screenshot-process failure leaves browser-image proof open, even if static validation passes.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Report screenshot proof as open instead of green.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep local route checks separate from real browser rendering and account proof.

experienceItems.lesson: Static link validation and browser rendering answer different questions.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Require browser proof for claims about rendered entry surfaces.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Prefer bundled Chromium and explicit browser evidence when normal auth browser setup is missing.

experienceItems.lesson: Authenticated browser proof on pages.dev is distinct from public shell browsing on lghui.top.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail merged browser rows that hide the origin and account state.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Record browser-not-run boundaries instead of translating process failures into success.

experienceItems.lesson: Real-exam integrity browser checks protect visible count and route behavior.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Run the browser integrity gate after changing real-exam visible ledgers.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep local route checks separate from real browser rendering and account proof.

experienceItems.lesson: Private-video browser gates are required for production teacher workflows.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Do not accept mock private-video gates as browser acceptance.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Prefer bundled Chromium and explicit browser evidence when normal auth browser setup is missing.

experienceItems.lesson: Missing browser/auth env should produce blocked/not-run, not invented pass output.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Require machine-readable blocked state when env inputs are absent.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Record browser-not-run boundaries instead of translating process failures into success.

experienceItems.lesson: Public browser checks should cover entry pages, not only the homepage.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail one-page-only public browser evidence for release-current claims.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep local route checks separate from real browser rendering and account proof.

experienceItems.lesson: Browser gate output should be summarized into durable JSON or docs for later workers.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Keep command evidence in the generated ledger so future workers can rerun it.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Prefer bundled Chromium and explicit browser evidence when normal auth browser setup is missing.

experienceItems.lesson: 390px overflow checks are required for route chips, counters, and blocker panels.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail release-ready wording when narrow mobile overflow has not been checked.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Treat mobile overflow, targets, focus, screen-reader labels, and JSON budget as release gates.

experienceItems.lesson: Interactive controls should preserve 44px touch targets on mobile.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Reject dense controls that shrink below the mobile target budget.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep large evidence behind intent-driven links and gzip sidecars.

experienceItems.lesson: Keyboard users need focus-visible states on new route chips and buttons.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Scan UI changes for focus-visible handling before release.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Prevent visual count ledgers from breaking narrow screens.

experienceItems.lesson: Icon, counter, and route controls need labels that still make sense to screen readers.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail unlabeled controls when they carry gate-critical information.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Treat mobile overflow, targets, focus, screen-reader labels, and JSON budget as release gates.

experienceItems.lesson: Count ledgers must remain readable on mobile, not only on desktop tables.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Require mobile-safe formatting for 316/61 and 38/30/61 counters.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep large evidence behind intent-driven links and gzip sidecars.

experienceItems.lesson: Large public JSON should stay within the round budget or be explicitly exempted.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Run the public JSON budget gate after adding public ledgers.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Prevent visual count ledgers from breaking narrow screens.

experienceItems.lesson: Gzip sidecars are part of the public data contract for large ledgers.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Require byte-for-byte gzip inflation to match the JSON.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Treat mobile overflow, targets, focus, screen-reader labels, and JSON budget as release gates.

experienceItems.lesson: Large evidence belongs behind intent-driven links instead of dumping everything into one page.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Reject pages that surface raw large evidence without navigation intent.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep large evidence behind intent-driven links and gzip sidecars.

experienceItems.lesson: Performance gates protect learner usability, not just bundle aesthetics.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Tie budget evidence to learner routes and public JSON size.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Prevent visual count ledgers from breaking narrow screens.

experienceItems.lesson: A11y and mobile constraints should be release-gate language, not optional polish.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail docs that demote mobile/a11y to future nice-to-have work.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Treat mobile overflow, targets, focus, screen-reader labels, and JSON budget as release gates.

experienceItems.lesson: Release gates need an explicit expected version so stale defaults cannot pass accidentally.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail gate runs that omit the expected version for current-release claims.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Make release claims converge across feed, edge constants, source ledgers, public shell, browser, monitor, and auth/storage blockers.

experienceItems.lesson: New optional local gates may add checks but must not weaken public shell, browser, auth, or expected-version gates.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Diff gate behavior for weakened release requirements.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep worker-local output as route material until the main release gate reruns.

experienceItems.lesson: Worker splits close only after one visible versioned public surface contains the result.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Reject worker-local completion as full release closure.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Ship every machine ledger with JSON, gzip, Markdown, and a checker.

experienceItems.lesson: Machine ledgers should ship JSON, gzip, Markdown, and checker together.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail when gzip does not inflate byte-for-byte or docs omit the same acceptance facts.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Make release claims converge across feed, edge constants, source ledgers, public shell, browser, monitor, and auth/storage blockers.

experienceItems.lesson: Dirty worktree allowances are local-integration boundaries, not production proof.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Require release summaries to name any dirty-checkout allowance.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep worker-local output as route material until the main release gate reruns.

experienceItems.lesson: Auth and storage blockers must remain in the release gate when private-video claims are in scope.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail release reports that remove blocked real-account or R2 states.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Ship every machine ledger with JSON, gzip, Markdown, and a checker.

experienceItems.lesson: Release gates must preserve privacy checks for protected 181103 data.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Fail release gates that pass while exposing raw protected paths or downloads.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Make release claims converge across feed, edge constants, source ledgers, public shell, browser, monitor, and auth/storage blockers.

experienceItems.lesson: Release work should patch the source of truth before consumers and mirrors.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Reject consumer-only fixes when source ledgers still drift.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Keep worker-local output as route material until the main release gate reruns.

experienceItems.lesson: Monitor output is necessary but not sufficient for authenticated or storage-backed claims.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Keep monitor proof scoped to public release surfaces.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Ship every machine ledger with JSON, gzip, Markdown, and a checker.

experienceItems.lesson: A checker should validate its own output budget, categories, fields, and gzip consistency.
experienceItems.antiRegressionGate: Run node --check and the checker after every ledger edit.
experienceItems.nextTarget: Make release claims converge across feed, edge constants, source ledgers, public shell, browser, monitor, and auth/storage blockers.

checks.id: each category has at least 10 items
evidence commands stay in allowed tool family
generated JSON has no unsafe path or runtime marker
generated Markdown has no unsafe path or runtime marker

acceptance.summary: Round300 optimization experience ledger has seven categories, at least 70 machine-checkable lessons, and byte-for-byte gzip consistency.
